availability_assumptions.available_ts_rule: feature.available_ts = current OHLCV input row available_ts
availability_assumptions.final_aggregate_boundary: completed ETH or anchored context may be consumed only after the relevant segment has completed; active-session final VWAP is forbidden intraday
availability_assumptions.lookback_rule: source rows may contribute only when source.available_ts <= output.available_ts
availability_assumptions.session_context: session_label is consumed as point-in-time metadata and not as a label-derived field

duplicate_or_equivalent_exposure_notes.summary: P13 locked FeaturePack and LabelPack inventory checked; no locked pack member resolves this P15 gap item.

formula_sketch.opening_range_rule: opening-range context is causal and unavailable before observed opening-window rows carry available_ts
formula_sketch.running_rule: running VWAP and distance-to-VWAP update only from completed OHLCV rows at or before output available_ts
formula_sketch.session_rule: session_label is metadata under the role-aware guard; final current-session aggregates are not used intraday
